chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3318 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.17613/2025 2. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 04.02.2026 Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, APG SIP Ismail and SIP/IO Shoaib Jahangir of PS Hyderi Market ------------------------------------------- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing viz. 26.12.2025 and 14.01.2026. Complainant has put his appearance and submits that he has settled his dispute with the applicant and case has been disposed of by way of compromise. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous, it is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gusher/PS
